'''âng-zh-h''' ('''kangazhah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeseem|unbeseem]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeseem|unbeseem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangazhah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingazhah|thingazhah]] || [[word:jingazhah|jingazhah]] || [[word:shingazhah|shingazhah]] || [[word:kingazhah|kingazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungazhah|thuthungazhah]] || [[word:jujungazhah|jujungazhah]] || [[word:shushungazhah|shushungazhah]] || [[word:kukungazhah|kukungazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungazhah|thungazhah]] || [[word:jungazhah|jungazhah]] || [[word:shungazhah|shungazhah]] || [[word:kungazhah|kungazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungazhah|thungazhah]] || [[word:jungazhah|jungazhah]] || [[word:shungazhah|shungazhah]] || [[word:kungazhah|kungazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengazhah|thengazhah]] || [[word:jengazhah|jengazhah]] || [[word:shengazhah|shengazhah]] || [[word:kengazhah|kengazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongazhah|thothongazhah]] || [[word:jojongazhah|jojongazhah]] || [[word:shoshongazhah|shoshongazhah]] || [[word:kokongazhah|kokongazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongazhah|thongazhah]] || [[word:jongazhah|jongazhah]] || [[word:shongazhah|shongazhah]] || [[word:kongazhah|kongazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongazhah|thongazhah]] || [[word:jongazhah|jongazhah]] || [[word:shongazhah|shongazhah]] || [[word:kongazhah|kongazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngazhah|thĂŠngazhah]] || [[word:jĂŠngazhah|jĂŠngazhah]] || [[word:shĂŠngazhah|shĂŠngazhah]] || [[word:kĂŠngazhah|kĂŠngazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangazhah|thathangazhah]] || [[word:jajangazhah|jajangazhah]] || [[word:shashangazhah|shashangazhah]] || [[word:kakangazhah|kakangazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazhah|thangazhah]] || [[word:jangazhah|jangazhah]] || [[word:shangazhah|shangazhah]] || [[word:kangazhah|kangazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazhah|thangazhah]] || [[word:jangazhah|jangazhah]] || [[word:shangazhah|shangazhah]] || [[word:kangazhah|kangazhah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangazhah|shangazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangazhah|goshangazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangazhah|gokishangazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangazhahnĂŒ|shangazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangazhahnknĂŒ|goshangazhahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazhahnĂŒ|gokishangazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangazhahshĂ«|shangazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkshĂ«|goshangazhahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangazhahshĂ«|gokishangazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazhahro|shangazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkro|goshangazhahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazhahro|gokishangazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazhahmu|shangazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkmu|goshangazhahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazhahmu|gokishangazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangazhahsher|shangazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangazhahnksher|goshangazhahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangazhahsher|gokishangazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangazhahng|shangazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkng|goshangazhahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangazhahng|gokishangazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangazhahya|shangazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkya|goshangazhahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangazhahya|gokishangazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangazhahyam|shangazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkyam|goshangazhahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangazhahyam|gokishangazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazhahnĂŒshĂ«|shangazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazhahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangazhahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazhahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazhahnĂŒro|shangazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazhahnknĂŒro|goshangazhahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazhahnĂŒro|gokishangazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazhahnĂŒmu|shangazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazhahnknĂŒmu|goshangazhahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazhahnĂŒmu|gokishangazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|shangazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazhahshĂ«ro|shangazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkshĂ«ro|goshangazhahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazhahshĂ«ro|gokishangazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazhahshĂ«mu|shangazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkshĂ«mu|goshangazhahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazhahshĂ«mu|gokishangazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazhahronĂŒ|shangazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkronĂŒ|goshangazhahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazhahronĂŒ|gokishangazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazhahroshĂ«|shangazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkroshĂ«|goshangazhahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazhahroshĂ«|gokishangazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazhahromu|shangazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkromu|goshangazhahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazhahromu|gokishangazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazhahmunĂŒ|shangazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkmunĂŒ|goshangazhahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazhahmunĂŒ|gokishangazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazhahmushĂ«|shangazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkmushĂ«|goshangazhahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazhahmushĂ«|gokishangazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazhahmuro|shangazhahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazhahnkmuro|goshangazhahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazhahmuro|gokishangazhahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
